habitat: Hedges, woodland edges and waste ground of Europe.
traditionalUsesEn: Astringent leaf for mild diarrhea and mouth rinses; autumn berries.
traditionalUsesDe: Adstringierendes Blatt und vitaminreiche Beere der Volksmedizin.
preparation: Leaf tea; fresh or cooked fruit.
cautions: Tannin-rich leaf — not long high-dose; thorns!
cautionsDe: Gerbstoffreiches Blatt – nicht langfristig hoch dosieren; Dornen!
historicalNotes: Thorny hedge larder of European countryside.
